name: GPT-4o mini
archDisplay: Dense, multimodal Transformer, small/low-cost tier (architecture/size undisclosed)
note: Small, cheap GPT-4o sibling that replaced GPT-3.5 Turbo as OpenAI's default budget model in ChatGPT and the API.

results.notes: OpenAI's official GPT-4o mini launch page reports MATH at 70.2%, part of the same benchmark table as the already-recorded MMLU/MGSM/HumanEval/MMMU rows. Direct automated fetch of openai.com returns 403 (same as the existing 4 rows in this file), but the figure is corroborated verbatim and consistently across multiple independent secondary sources/search results quoting the official launch table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via web search of OpenAI's official announcement (direct fetch blocked by 403, but search excerpts quote the page verbatim): MMLU 82%, MGSM 87%, HumanEval 87.2%, MMMU 59.4% all match exactly. Release date 2024-07-18, 128K context, and closed/proprietary licensing confirmed by independent sources (OpenAI blog via search, Azure blog, DataCamp). No changes made.
